segments.text: The words of Jeremiah the son of Hilkiah, of the priests who were in Anathoth in the land of Benjamin
to whom the word of the Lord came in the days of Josiah the son of Amon, king of Judah, in the thirteenth year of his reign

It came also in the days of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah, king of Judah, until the end of the eleventh year of Zedekiah the son of Josiah, king of Judah, until the carrying away of Jerusalem captive in the fifth month
Then the word of the Lord came to me, saying:
Before I formed you in the womb I knew you; Before you were born I sanctified you; I ordained you a prophet to the nations.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Then said I:
Ah, Lord God! Behold, I cannot speak, for I am a youth.
segments.speaker: Jeremiah

segments.text: But the Lord said to me:
Do not say, 'I am a youth,' For you shall go to all to whom I send you, And whatever I command you, you shall speak.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Do not be afraid of their faces, For I am with you to deliver you
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Then the Lord put forth His hand and touched my mouth, and the Lord said to me:
Behold, I have put My words in your mouth.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: See, I have this day set you over the nations and over the kingdoms, To root out and to pull down, To destroy and to throw down, To build and to plant.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Moreover the word of the Lord came to me, saying,
Jeremiah, what do you see?
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: And I said,
I see a branch of an almond tree.
segments.speaker: Jeremiah

segments.text: Then the Lord said to me,
You have seen well, for I am ready to perform My word.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: And the word of the Lord came to me the second time, saying,
What do you see?
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: And I said,
I see a boiling pot, and it is facing away from the north.
segments.speaker: Jeremiah

segments.text: Then the Lord said to me:
Out of the north calamity shall break forth On all the inhabitants of the land.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: For behold, I am calling All the families of the kingdoms of the north. They shall come and each one set his throne At the entrance of the gates of Jerusalem, Against all its walls all around, And against all the cities of Judah.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: I will utter My judgments Against them concerning all their wickedness, Because they have forsaken Me, Burned incense to other gods, And worshiped the works of their own hands.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Therefore prepare yourself and arise, And speak to them all that I command you. Do not be dismayed before their faces, Lest I dismay you before them.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: For behold, I have made you this day A fortified city and an iron pillar, And bronze walls against the whole land— Against the kings of Judah, Against its princes, Against its priests, And against the people of the land.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: They will fight against you, But they shall not prevail against you. For I am with you to deliver you.
segments.speaker: The Lord
